chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.B.A. No.S-1120 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. No.14351/2021 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. No.14352/2021 4. For hearing of main case 07.12.2021 Mr. Amjad Ali Mangi advocate for applicant along with applicant. -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. It is stated that applicant is innocent but has been falsely implicated in this case; that the applicant wants to surrender before the trial court but needs protection as he apprehends his arrest. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant Muhammad Essa son of Basar Khan is granted protective bail for seven days from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (fifty thousand) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days on 13.12.2021 or on surrender of the applicant before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
